ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the strategy */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the portfolio */,
  "asset_allocation" TEXT /* Asset allocation of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data point */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used to generate the data */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the data belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the trade */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "q_learning_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Q-learning data point */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used to generate the data */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the data belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the trade */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_q_learning_data_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_q_learning_data_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data point */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used to generate the data */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the data belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the trade */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email_verification_token" TEXT /* Email verification token for the user */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the portfolio is assigned to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the market data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security mentioned in the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the portfolio */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark used to evaluate the portfolio's performance */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric used to evaluate the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the setting */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
